title: How to feed Nellie and Mira (or any two cats)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f6467","text":"My cats Nellie and Mira have developed an annoying habit of wanting to eat different amount of food, at different times. This is the best way to make sure they both eat everything in one go so I don't have to worry about one of them eating the other's food.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8btlb","text":"Mira WILL eat Nellie's food if left unnatended","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"2ud0b","text":"Applaws Tuna Fillet in broth","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fchnl","text":"Lily's Kitchen White Fish with Salmon Dry Kibble","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"577gf","text":"Applaw's Whoel Mackerel Loin Treat","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"olqi","text":"LickyMat food mat","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Get food mats likely on the floor of the living room and clean leftover food with soap and a scrub
Dry the silicone mat, especially the underside to prevent mould growth
Grab wet food can from cabinet above fridge and open the container
Split the contents in half, making sure each food mat gets 35 g of wet food
Add 20 g of dried kibble located to the left of the oven to each mat next to the wet food
Bring one mat to Mira, who will immediately lunge towards her food
Grab the other mat and bring it to a different room so Nellie can eat in peace and not be bullied by Mira to eat more
Stay with nellie for 00:05:00 so she feels safe while eating
Finish by cuddling both of them and telling them how pretty they are
Nellie is a picky eater, so add a few bites of the mackerel treat stored in fridge 4 °C to increase her appetite
Spread the wet food through the pad so it has a thickness of about 1-2 cm
creator: Gabriel Rocha
